event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.heatwave.onse: Abnormal heat currents are surging in, the distant horizon begins to shimmer in the heat haze.
event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.heatwave.peak: Extreme heat wave has peaked! The world has become a giant oven.
event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.heatwave.reco: The heat wave is receding, atmospheric pressure is gradually returning to normal.
event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.coldwave.onse: A powerful cold front is approaching at alarming speed, temperatures are about to plummet.
event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.coldwave.peak: The cold wave has fully erupted!
event.tfc_scorch_and_frost.coldwave.reco: The cold front has passed through.
